name: Cheese-Scalloped Potatoes/Carrots
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds potatoes (5 cups, pared and thinly sliced)
5 medium carrots (2 cups, pared), diagonally sliced
recipeInstructions:
CHEESE SAUCE:
3 tablespoons butter
2 tablespoons flour
1 teaspoon salt
1/8 teaspoon pepper
Dash cayenne
1 1/2 cups milk
1 1/2 cups grated sharp cheddar cheese
In a large saucepan, bring water and salt to a boil. Add potatoes, onion, and carrots; cook, covered, for about 5 minutes or until partially tender. Drain. To make the cheese sauce, melt butter in a small saucepan. Stir in flour, salt, pepper, and cayenne, stirring constantly, for about 1 minute. Remove from heat; stir in milk and blend well. Return to a boil over medium heat, stirring until thick and smooth. Gradually add the cheese mixture, stirring until melted.
Layer half of the vegetables (potatoes and carrots) in a greased 2 1/2-quart casserole dish. Spread half of the cheese sauce evenly over the vegetables. Sprinkle with remaining cheese. Cover with foil and bake at 375°F for 30 minutes. Remove the foil for the last 10 minutes to brown the top. Yield: 6 servings.
